locator.label: In this module you will learn about: the Breathalyzer
locator.sectionHeading: In this module you will learn about: the Breathalyzer

chunks.text:
In this module you will learn about:
alcohol and its effects upon the human body
the Breathalyzer
the Intoxilyxer and consequences of impaired driving
crime case studies involving impaired driving
This module has 2 assignments (content, case study) and 1 quiz.
chunks.titleGuess: In this module you will learn about: the Breathalyzer
